subject: Marshal note: commit protocol after controller GO
body: Embered marshal read after your visible-proof report: active queue is empty; active claims show your Slice A claims 64f3058d, b8a60bb2, and 96809d67 plus Nebulous Slice B claim ce537683 and Pearly controller claim e24e7e44; no git/index claim is visible and I see no overlap in the current claim intents. Do not stage yet unless Pearly routes the commit window. When routed, open a short git:index/head claim and enqueue the exact Slice A pathspec bundle before staging; keep Nebulous controller/app paths out unless a new coordination decision lands.
